episodes.title: Frontier AI Lab Competition — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna) previews with a cost attack on Anthropic; Google delays Gemini 3.5 for a rebuild; Anthropic's $965B round; China's open-weight surge and the end of the H20.

episodes.title: Capital Markets Cross-Asset Radar — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: Cross-asset radar into the June FOMC minutes: Warsh's no-dot hawkish hold vs. a soft 57k payrolls print, a 40-year-low yen, tight credit, and a higher-vol rates regime.

episodes.title: Digital Money, Crypto, and Market Structure — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: Digital money: Bitcoin's macro-driven bounce to ~$64k on thin flows, while GENIUS Act implementation, USDC's share gains, reserve money-market funds, and Open USD rewire the plumbing.

episodes.title: Strategic Power, Energy, and Institutional Change — July 8, 2026
episodes.summary: Strategic power: transformers as the binding constraint (DPA finding), AI power demand, China's $295B sovereign compute grid, and the November rare-earth expiry.
